recommendations.action: Stop rebuilding cards that already have PG package artifacts.
recommendations.reason: 54 current candidates are already covered by prepared package manifests in the report directory.

recommendations.action: After the PG-ready lane shrinks, batch the biggest split-scope cluster.
recommendations.reason: The partially supported backlog is 68 cards. Top exact cluster: targeted_damage_variant_v1 (21)

recommendations.action: Open new runtime only on the most reusable family remaining.
recommendations.reason: Runtime-only backlog is 24 cards. Top reusable exact scope cluster: damage_all_variant_v1 (2). Largest raw family is token_maker (20 cards across 20 scopes), so it should wait for taxonomy/test-miner support instead of leading the queue.

recommendations.action: Keep the manual mapper lane last.
recommendations.reason: 356 cards still need mapper/manual review; this lane should not drive executor architecture.

recommendations.action: Isolate missing-XMage cards as a separate exception lane.
recommendations.reason: 2 cards are blocked by missing local XMage source.
